title: TN Class 12 results: Erode tops the state with 98.87% pass percentage
summary: Erode has topped Tamil Nadu in the Class 12 board results with a pass percentage of 98.87%, while Coimbatore slipped to the 13th position. Officials credited targeted remedial coaching in government schools.

title: Turmeric arrivals drop sharply at Erode market; spot prices lose ₹700/quintal
summary: Turmeric arrivals fell sharply at the Erode mandi this week and spot prices lost ₹700 per quintal on weak demand. Traders said about 40 percent of fresh stock remains unsold.

title: GI tag push for Erode turmeric gathers momentum
summary: Trade bodies in Erode are pushing for a GI tag for Erode turmeric to protect the brand and unlock premium export markets, with the application now back with the registry.

title: Erode voters openly frustrated with shifting AIADMK loyalties
summary: On the streets of Erode district today, voters openly expressed frustration over shifting loyalties of certain AIADMK MLAs. The Erode District Congress Committee staged a protest against Governor R.N. Arlekar.

title: Collector inspects Bhavani and Kodumudi panchayats
summary: The Erode District Collector inspected ongoing works in Bhavani panchayat on May 13 and Kodumudi panchayat on May 12, reviewing drinking water lines, drainage and welfare scheme delivery.

title: Heavy rain lashes Erode district; waterlogging in low-lying areas
summary: Heavy rain accompanied by gusty winds lashed Erode district overnight, leading to waterlogging in several low-lying neighbourhoods. The district administration has activated rain control rooms.
